beanstalk.sourcebundle.CfnAbout: The `SourceBundle` property is an embedded property of the [AWS::ElasticBeanstalk::ApplicationVersion](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-beanstalk-sourcebundle.html) resource. It specifies the Amazon S3 location of the source bundle for an AWS Elastic Beanstalk application version.

beanstalk.sourcebundle.S3Bucket.Description: The Amazon S3 bucket where the data is located.

beanstalk.sourcebundle.S3Key.Description: The Amazon S3 key where the data is located.
